suite.name: Login Admin

test.name: TC03 Verify Admin Login Navigate To Dashboard

kw.name: Given User is on login page
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000/login // ändra sen'.

suite.doc: Test suite for Admin Login functionality based on TC03.

suite.name: Login Employee

test.name: Verify Employee Login Navigate To Dashboard

kw.name: Given User is on login page
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000/login // ändra sen'.

kw.name: Then User is navigated to employee dashboard

test.doc: Verifies that an existing employee can log in successfully.

suite.doc: Test suite for Employee Login functionality.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
